name: UKG Ready
description: UKG Ready is a HR and payroll software that streamlines workforce processes and scales with business needs to support growth. Learn more about UKG Ready

reviews.review_title: UKG Ready is time well managed.
reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: My overall experience with UKG Ready is good. The app made clocking in and out accessible. It also made time management easy.
reviews.review_pros: I like the ease of use with UKG Ready. I also like that i coukd access it anywhere at anytime. I like the convenience.
reviews.review_cons: There wasn't anything that i did not like about UKG. UKG Ready was easy to understand and utilize for work.

reviews.author_profession: Director of Business and Employee Relations
reviews.review_description: Overall experience is very good. Very helpful when we do have issues and work hard to communicate with us.
reviews.review_pros: Ability to communicate with staff continuously. Use of tabs on the home page to bring new ideas and reach our employees.
reviews.review_cons: Small hiccups. Things work one week but not the next. Call pay & Holidays in Radiology and lab are still not correct. (We are equally at fault for not following up to get them corrected). FMLA - would love to get FMLA to work correctly, just does not track in Ready.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: I had a lot of success using UKG Ready during the onboarding process, as I had a high volume of hires while utilize the program. Most of my troubles with UKG came form editing/changing employee information after hire.
reviews.review_pros: I liked that UKG Ready had a lot a features that I could utilize for employee tracking, particularly relating to employee management and recruiting.
reviews.review_cons: It could be due to the organization not having enough UKG Ready add-ons, but I felt that integration was very poor with the regular version of UKG. The information transfer made no sense to me and I found it made some work difficult.

reviews.review_description: everything was good from receiving UKG until installation , all went good specially on how UKG have a system that can integrate with other system with corporate level governance . for example UKG with work day
reviews.review_pros: ease of use time tracking access and availability and align with corporate governance standard which this process is not easy for my company . in the other hand UKG reputation came from Europe which stand for high quality product
reviews.review_cons: Value for money need to a customize base on country . the cost can be customize with the support require on country related requirement

reviews.review_description: I used it at my previous company, which was a very large public school district. We had well over 5,000 employees.
reviews.review_pros: It was very user friendly. It offered not only the capability of clocking in and out via the web, but also using physical cards and a time clock.
reviews.review_cons: I can't recall a negative experience I had with UKG Ready. It was a great option for our school district.

reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience with UKG Ready has been positive, especially when it comes to access and availability. The system is easy to access when needed, which helps both employees and managers stay on track. I also really appreciate the paperless aspect, as it makes processes more efficient and keeps everything organized in one place.
reviews.review_pros: The system is very easy to navigate, even for new users. The time tracking features are reliable and make it simple to manage employee hours.
reviews.review_cons: The main drawback of UKG Ready is the occasional bugs and system issues. However, their support team is reliable and does a good job responding to tickets in a timely manner.

reviews.review_description: Overall, my experience has been positive it would be great if it transferred the data to our payroll system.
reviews.review_pros: It is easy to use for tracking time, schedules, and employee information. It helps keep everything organized in one system and makes it simple to manage daily work tasks.
reviews.review_cons: It is not compatible with our current payroll system, so we have to do manual work to process employee payroll, which adds extra steps and time to the process.

reviews.review_description: Generally one of teh best systems I have used over my 20 years in Payroll. Always improving the customer experience. On top of new technology like AI.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of Use. Once learned its very simple to set up your needs on this system. Customer support. I think its one of teh best customer support system I have used.
reviews.review_cons: Payroll System is an add on. API works well. But nice to have it all in one system Part time hourly rate is skewed due to it needing to flow correctly to Payroll Metrics

reviews.review_description: I believe UKG has been one of the easiest and most seamless payroll areas of medical I have worked in. The customer service is also very helpful and quick with responses.
reviews.review_pros: The payroll processing is seamless and it is very simple to look at time cards and fix mistakes or add PTO to a day. It shows you each area of the time off you have accumulated and not just a generic message.
reviews.review_cons: It was very difficult to get to the benefit section or figure out how to edit your time that was already added. It is simple to fix the time card but getting to the section needed was confusing.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: This software was easy to use. It was especially good when trying run a small retail business with only a few employees. I wouldn’t really say I had any cons with his software. I wouldn’t use it for a large company. Its more for small businesses.
reviews.review_pros: This software was easy to use. It was especially good when trying run a small retail business with only a few employees.
reviews.review_cons: I wouldn’t really say I had any cons with his software. I wouldn’t use it for a large company. Its more for small businesses.

reviews.review_title: the easiest systems my company has used to manage time
reviews.review_description: Overall it has been one of the easiest systems my company has used to manage time. The features are pretty easy to use benefits portal, time off, each of those things are important and they are pretty easy to maneuver.
reviews.review_pros: Even when the internet is down, I’m able to punch in or out and it be posted when signal has returned.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes the clock in and clock out buttons switch, and if you’re not careful you’ll clock in instead of out for lunch.

reviews.review_title: Better for a technologically savvy company.
reviews.review_description: I would say my overall personal experience is varied. There are some things I liked such as the many categories. There were things I didn't like, such as the required in depth training.
reviews.review_pros: Readily available and thorough customer support whenever our company was in need. They were always available.
reviews.review_cons: UKG was very different from the program we were porting over from and there were a lot of bugs and mistakes.

reviews.review_title: UKG Ready allows timeclock and work time scheduling in an easy to use App
reviews.review_description: I have used the App for quite some time. It allows access to my timesheet, schedule and also time off functions. I can do just about everything with the UKG Ready App that I can do on the computer GUI.
reviews.review_pros: UKG Ready is a powerful App that allows you to track, Monitor and use its Timeclock functions from an easy to navigate app
reviews.review_cons: The App updates frequently and loses all of the log in credentials. It easily allows you to reset the password but can take a few minutes to do which can interfere with work.

reviews.review_description: Overall, it has been a positive experience for me. I don't struggle too much with technology or applications on your phone. Plus, it is nice that I can check things out at my leisure.
reviews.review_pros: Ease of use. Once you have your company code, log in is simple and brings you right to where you need to be. It allows for easy time tracking-I like that I can double check when I have clocked in and out for lunches or the day or, to see where I am at with time for the week. It is like any other personal app with notifications except a little better. When I submit a PTO request through the computer, I get the notification on my phone that the request has been submitted and is pending approval. Confirmation is nice.
reviews.review_cons: Nothing really. It is a little disappointing you can't clock in and out from your phone, but I understand limiting that capability. Sometimes people become deceitful.

reviews.review_pros: There are so many functions with UKG Ready that you can customize it to whatever your company needs.
reviews.review_cons: Sometimes there can be too many features and it can get confusing. But with the customizing, it works out great.

reviews.review_description: A seamless experience that did not involve several tabs or pages to easily access the necessary information I required.
reviews.review_pros: The company I currently work for uses this as an addition to our UKG app to make it easier to manage hours, pto requests, messages and updates and I really enjoy the fact that it is easily accessible both on the job and outside of work!
reviews.review_cons: no cons, everything has been great thus far and i am sure it will continue that way!

reviews.review_description: Easy to use and learn, the company offers different tiers which is great and ready is perfect for a company on the grow.
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use and streamline different aspects of payroll and scheduling , love that it has an app for employees.
reviews.review_cons: Can be pricey but worth it, otherwise i really enjoy UKG and have zero complaints on the service , would recommend.

reviews.review_title: good app to address common scheduling concerns
reviews.review_description: good experience. Basic needs are addressed in this app It's a good feature to clock in and out when in the vicinity and not out of range.
reviews.review_pros: easy access to book a day off even when not at the workplace. adjust time clock there is a discrepancy when a staffer is not in.
reviews.review_cons: logs me out when it time lapse. must log in each time if you're on an android may forget about your time on break to remind you

reviews.review_pros: Clock punch quick from phone, schedule sync real time, accruals auto roll so PTO left clear, request approve in few taps, payroll run one click, compliance flag early, alerts reach crew fast, custom report build few steps, export Excel smooth, timecard bulk edit swift, manager view loads light, all this trimming hours each week.
reviews.review_cons: Some setting hiding deep, tweak pay rule many clicks, mobile app sign out random, report download drag at peak

reviews.review_description: I have been using UKG since I started to work at my new company and I don't have complaints about it, I never had issues with the software, other than forgot my password:')
reviews.review_pros: The UKG Platform is easy to set up, the menu is basic, you do not have to navigate a lot to find what you looking for.
reviews.review_cons: the only think i don't like about this platform is the app menu vs the desk menu, I know the desk menu will always be better but there's some apps which already contains more of the desk menu into the app.

reviews.review_description: I had use it 10 month, generally it so useful, I can find all my documents., updates, download all my paystubs
reviews.review_pros: Easy to use, always keep truck of payments, updates and your progress. Good to have mobile app and notification for payrolls
reviews.review_cons: Unable to request day off from mobile app, I can see only booked time but unable to crate new request. I do not like change the password, because my previous one new is old.

reviews.review_pros: Combines HR, payroll, time tracking, scheduling, and talent management in one system. Reduces the need for multiple vendors. Highly configurable to match your specific business rules and workflows. Accessible via web and mobile app.
reviews.review_cons: The system is very powerful, but that means it's not super intuitive out of the box. Admins often need training to configure things properly. Bad implementation = long-term headaches.

reviews.review_description: An overall pleasant timekeeping app with an intuitive experience.
reviews.review_pros: Consistent app functionality and easy to use dashboard.
reviews.review_cons: You can't save a trusted device for longer than a week at a time.

reviews.author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
reviews.review_description: It's good for time keeping and also provides the ability to view scheduled shifts and even pick up new ones.
reviews.review_pros: How the features are easily accessible via mobile and also in web-based. It also gives me the option to add tiles.
reviews.review_cons: I haven't found something I didn't like. I think it's still an app that will be evolving. Seems a bit simple.

reviews.review_description: Excellent system to manage time, vacation time, and pay stubs.
reviews.review_pros: The way it integrates punch system with pay stubs, pay dates, W-2s. It also has all my employee info organized and able to edit/update.
reviews.review_cons: Probably not much of a con for employers but the precision of the clock in system makes it hard to manage/avoid overtime.
